name: Western Union Money Order Only
description_short: Edina's Western Union Money Order Only at 5401 France Ave S offers 24-hour check cashing and money transfers.
description_long:
Western Union Money Order Only at 5401 France Ave S in Edina, MN serves the south metro Minneapolis area as a standalone check-cashing destination. This location operates 24 hours every single day, making it convenient for Edina residents who need services outside normal banking hours.

The Edina location provides check cashing, money orders, and money transfer services. Call +1 952-920-0704 to confirm rates, fees, or service availability. As a dedicated money services provider, this location specializes in rapid cash access without appointment needs.

Edina residents can rely on this location for same-day check cashing and emergency money orders. Bring a valid ID and your check or payment documentation. Western Union Money Order Only offers quick, straightforward financial services for those who need cash fast.
pros: No bank account or credit card required—accessible to unbanked consumers
Money orders do not expire, allowing indefinite holding periods before cashing
Available at thousands of Western Union locations nationwide
Can be paid with cash or debit card at participating locations
Online money order refund request process available without visiting a location
Widely accepted at banks, grocery stores, and check-cashing retailers
Prepaid nature eliminates overdraft risk and ensures funds are available
Commonly accepted by property management companies for rent payments
cons: Not all Western Union locations cash money orders, requiring verification before purchase
Location-specific fees vary with no clear published fee schedule
State-dependent inactivity fees (one to three years) reduce principal amounts if uncashed
Requires in-person visits to purchase; no online ordering available
Maximum amount limits vary by location with no centralized policy stated
Additional fees may apply to refund requests, reducing net recovery
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked individuals without checking accounts
Renters paying rent to property managers who don't accept checks
Consumers preferring not to send cash through mail or hand-to-hand
People making secure purchases where checks or cash are not accepted
diagnosis: Western Union money orders are best suited for unbanked consumers, renters, and individuals in situations where checks are not accepted but secure payment methods are required. The primary caveat is that not all Western Union locations cash money orders, and state-dependent fees may reduce funds after one to three years of inactivity, making this a less convenient option than traditional checking accounts or digital payment platforms.
services: Money order purchase at physical Western Union locations
Payment by cash or debit card for money orders
Location finder tool to verify money order availability
Money order refund requests submitted online
Money order receipt retention for status checking and refunds
Cashing of money orders at partner banks and retailers
Direct deposit of money orders into bank accounts
Step-by-step guidance on filling out money orders
FAQ resources and money order usage guides
Refund processing with variable fees depending on location
meta_description: Western Union Money Order Only at 5401 France Ave S, Edina, MN. 24-hour check cashing and money orders available.
